title: Pastry Garden
description: A mod all about adding strawberry cows
body:
![Large text logo of Pastry Garden](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5baaa7e5f2eaffbfe37b60821febe79dc76549cd.png)

# Watch this small showcase video on Pastry Garden!
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/7I4jM7SAI10" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

----------------------------------------------------------------------
> This mod adds **3 new food items** and **a new mob.** **The Strawberry Cow!**


![Strawberry cow walking gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6cd4e563737b6faa8e2b912bd0fb3715db48af15.gif)

----------------------------------------------------------------------

**The Strawberry Cow:**
> - Can be **sheared into normal cows**, droping **strawberries** in the process.
> - Can be **breed**
> - Can be milked for **strawberry milk** with buckets
> - Spawns in **Cherry Grove biomes**

**Strawberries:**
> - Can be **eaten** for **speed and regeneration effect**
> - Used to craft **Strawberry Jam Cream Pastry**
> - Dropped from **Strawberry Cows**

**Strawberry Milk Bucket:**
> - Use **bucket** on **Strawberry Cow** to make **Strawberry Milk**
> - Used to craft **Strawberry Jam Cream Pastry**
> - Can be **drinken** for **speed and regeneration effect**

**Strawberry Jam Cream Pastry:**
> - Can be **eaten** for **speed and regeneration effect**
> - Can be used as a **food source**

# **QUESTIONS**

Q. **May I use this in a modpack?**

**Yes, you may,** I do ask that **you leave credits** somewhere in the modpack.

Q. **Can I port this mod to Fabric/Quilt?**

**Yes,** please ask before doing though as **I would like to be a featured member on the mod page.**

Q. **Can I port this mod to Forge?**

**No,** I do not feel comfortable with my mod ported to forge.

Q. **Can you backport this mod?**

**No,** I will not be backporting any of my mods and **I do not feel comfortable with my mods being backported either**

Q. **Can I port this mod to Bedrock?**

**Yes,** you may backport this mod to Bedrock, however, **please ask me about distributing the mod before doing so.**

Q. **When will you update to?**

**Wait.** Literally just wait, I mod for fun in my free time as a hobby, I will update when I want to.

**(discord: lysticqx)**
